text_block_list.text:
One day, while discussing Hishi Amazon's training
with her, I can't help but notice something...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Urk... You sure know how to read me, Teach.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, everyone in the dorm is gettin' together
for a fright night. They asked me to make them
ghost costumes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm glad they like my sewing skills so much, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not exactly jazzed about having to watch a
horror film, even if it's for the sake of gathering
costume references...
choice_data_list:
I didn't know you weren't good with horror
movies.

I didn't know you weren't good with horror
movies.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and wh-what's it to you?! Everyone's got
their weaknesses!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can handle earthquakes, thunder, fires, creepy
old guys—you name it. But ghosts... I can't do
ghosts!
choice_data_list: You want me to watch it with you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Would you?! You'd be doing me a huge favor, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It'd be pointless watching the movie for reference
if I just get spooked and look away from the
screen whenever things get scary.

And so, we watch a horror movie in my office. To
stimulate the feel of a fright night, I keep the
lights off.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Um, Teach... any ideas when the ghosts're gonna
show up?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I keep bracin' myself for the next jump scare, but
at this rate, not even my nerves of steel're gonna
be able to hold out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... What a cheap way of doing things. They
should stop delayin' it and just jump out alrea—

text_block_list.name: Movie Ghost
text_block_list.text: RAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: EEEEEK!

text_block_list.name: Movie Victim
text_block_list.text: Arrrrgghh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
They got him... just like that! He didn't even stand
a chance!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Teach... I'm done! I know this was for the
costumes, but I just can't go on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You can't one-on-one a ghost! None of your hits
would land!

Hishi Amazon's nerves are beyond frayed... But at
this rate, she won't be able to get any costume
references. How can we overcome this?
choice_data_list:
So the undead would be fine if you could fight
them?

So the undead would be fine if you could fight
them?

text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon's nerves are beyond frayed... But at
this rate, she won't be able to get any costume
references. How can we overcome this?
choice_data_list:
So the undead would be fine if you could fight
them?

So the undead would be fine if you could fight
them?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. I could easily come out on top with a
good punch and kick!

Working off that idea, I instead suggest we watch
some films where the enemies are susceptible to
physical damage.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, yeah! That's a great idea! I like it! So what do
you recommend, Teach?
choice_data_list: How about starting off with the remake?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's so different about that one?! Choose
something else, please!
choice_data_list: Well, it takes place in a post-apocalyptic world.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That does sound like a fair bit of scrappin' would
be going on. But aren't the enemies just regular
ol' thugs?! I need references for ghosts!
choice_data_list: How about this one, then? It has a mummy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! You can definitely clock a mummy
in the face and take 'em down, and that's just
enough horror for me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We should have watched this from the start.
You're pretty smart, Teach.
I accept her compliment and show her the cover of the movie Umamusume vs. Mummy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What's with this mummy? Its bandages are
practically fallin' off. How sloppy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My costumes won't have this problem—I'll make
sure the bandages are wrapped so tightly they're
practically skintight!

...Costume criticisms aside, it looks like Hishi
Amazon is back to her normal self.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What! Are you telling me to abandon you and run
off with my tail tucked between my legs?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm not doing that! If it's gonna come down
to that, uh...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'd rather get over my fear of ghosts! Let
me show you what it means to have guts!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, sure. I won't.
choice_data_list: Can we keep the lights down and volume as is?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yep, they're fine! As long as you're good, Teach.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm... Nah, I'm good...

We watch the horror movie to the very end.
However...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh, hehehe! Teach!
Thud!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I-I'm feeling a little weak in the knees...

Hishi Amazon experiences firsthand just how hard
overcoming your fears is...
